papers_mined.title: Ifa (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Yoruba geomantic divination with 256 binary signs (Odù) — 16 main Odu + 240 derivative (16×16); each odù has 8 marks in 4 vertical pairs (binary configuration).

papers_mined.title: Ifa Divination System UNESCO ICH 00146
papers_mined.note: UNESCO Masterpiece intangible heritage; 256-odu literary corpus with ~800 ese verses per odu.

papers_mined.title: Opon Ifa Wooden Divination Tray (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Wooden tray on which palm-nut markings are cast; binary-mark configurations interpreted by babalawo against 256-odu catalog.

papers_mined.title: Yoruba Ifa Binary System Mathematics Western Binary Logic
papers_mined.note: Ifa 8-bit binary structure (4 pairs × 2 marks) mathematically equivalent to 256 outcomes — base-2 lookup.

papers_mined.title: Rubric-Based LLM Judge Methodologies Adnan Masood (Medium 2026/04)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: rubric-based evals with structured per-criterion judgement + criterion-level reward signals.

papers_mined.title: Autorubric Unifying Rubric-Based LLM Evaluation (2603.00077)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: unified rubric framework + automatic rubric refinement + structured criterion lookup.

papers_mined.title: Rubric-Grounded Reinforcement Learning Structured Judge Rewards (2605.08061)

papers_mined.title: Langfuse LLM-as-a-Judge
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: production-grade LLM-as-judge with fixed catalog of evaluators (Hallucination, Context-Relevance, Toxicity, Helpfulness, etc).
